name: Body Scrub
recipeIngredient: 1 oz Rice bran or oat bran
6 Drops essential oils of Lavender or rosemary
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the plant oils in a bowl and heat gently until warm.
2. Mix in the rice bran or oat bran and essential oils.
3. Stand on a large towel and apply the mixture to your skin using small, circular motions, working from your toes up to your neck. Avoid applying to the face.
4. Rinse off with lukewarm water in the shower, without soap.
5. Finish by rinsing with cold water and drying thoroughly with a towel.
